strengths: Exceeds 15-year minimum with 20+ years of diverse software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains
Currently working on AI infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, demonstrating active engagement with emerging AI technologies
Strong hands-on technical leadership credentials with full-stack competency and experience across TypeScript, Node.js, AWS CDK, and distributed systems
concerns: Lacks formal AI/ML education (no Master's/PhD) and demonstrated expertise in building AI-powered products; current work is infrastructure-focused rather than AI strategy
No evidence of director-level strategic leadership, product vision ownership, or advising customers/partners on technology strategy adoption
Background emphasizes hands-on engineering and technical implementation rather than identifying strategic opportunities for differentiation or leading cross-functional product initiatives
response.justification: Bogdan has solid technical credentials with 20+ years of engineering experience and emerging AI infrastructure involvement at re:cinq. However, the Principal Engineer (AI Strategy) role specifically requires director-level strategic leadership in AI/ML product development, customer advisory capabilities, and demonstrated products built with AI. Bogdan's background is primarily hands-on engineering rather than strategic product innovation. The absence of formal AI/ML education and lack of evidence of leading strategic initiatives, owning product vision, or advising on technology adoption represent significant gaps for this specialized AI strategy position.
